title: Anchor Functional Requirements
summary: Numbered functional requirements (FR-001..FR-081) defining Anchor's account, Telegram, calendar, check-in, memory, trusted-contact, billing, and i18n behaviors, each with acceptance criteria.
scope: Memory facts, diary, recall, correction, deletion
Message size and conversation budget limits
notes: Strong PRD: requirement + acceptance-criteria structure throughout, path docs/requirements/. Some entries embed technical contract detail (e.g. FR-070 anchor_user_plan schema, FR-071 Stripe webhook events) that lean SPEC, but the dominant document form is requirements with acceptance criteria, so classified PRD. References ADR-0001 and ADR-0005 as locked sources.
